message:
feat(tui): redesign message row with sender, ack badge, and semantic styling (br-1xt0m.1.9.2)

Improve message row hierarchy for faster triage:
- Show sender name (truncated to 12 chars) in each row
- Add ack-required indicator (@) with accent styling
- Apply semantic styles: ID/LIVE in meta/accent, timestamp in meta,
  sender in secondary, subject in primary
- LIVE entries now visually distinct with accent-colored marker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
